>Synopsis: New port: deve= l/py-jira A library to ease use of the JIRA 5 REST APIs

>Priority: low
>Category: ports
>Class: change-request=
>Release: FreeBSD= 9.1-RELEASE amd64
>Environment:
Tested in FreeBSD 8= .2 and 9.1

System: FreeBSD snf-57783 9.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 9.1-RELEA= SE #0 r243825: Tue Dec 4 09:23:10 UTC 2012 root@farrell.cse.buffalo.edu:/us= r/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC amd64

>Description:
A library to ease use of = the JIRA 5 REST APIs
>How-To-Repeat:
N/A
>Fix:
# This is a = shell archive. =C2=A0Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file". =C2= =A0Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will = be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
=
# This archive contains:
#
# py-jira
# = py-jira/Makefile
# py-jira/distinfo
# py-jira/pkg-descr
<= div># py-jira/pkg-plist
# py-jira/files
# py-jira/files/patch-tlsl= ite_requirement
#
echo c - py-jira
mkdir -p p= y-jira > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - py-jira/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >py-jira/Makefile << '97d0f21be90eef= 86d55dc95a3e794956'
X# Created by: Alexandros Kosiaris <akosiaris+po= rts@gmail.com>
X# $FreeBSD$

X
